{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202251777572B4E40C4E3723A96"}"},"total":474},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402744586487415577","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看这种类型的文，感觉格外的好看，就是学姐的戏份太少了存在感有点低，看开头说女强男弱我还以为会发展成四爱那种呢，整体来说还是不错的，番外快点搞[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723592525,"group_id":"7366556488057244696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxeXWcW7Sa9zigWKvZZzShvlE1eTq75cRMT1+wxXab5I","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f7e0c6c812674b969b1030fe1b583a59~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704938&x-signature=xqe9Cb6%2BNoQPgzeUdlNJbh3%2Bd4E%3D","user_id":"1754459813197020","user_name":"K52S"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1754459813197020","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366556488057244696","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常+多女主+轻度病娇+强制爱+男弱女强（介意慎入）（无任何金手指）】
雪夜，江时被母亲丢下跑路，他被迫寄宿在高傲妹妹家。
江时本以为要卑微求着妹妹才能生存下去，但没想到妹妹竟然是个病娇！
基于曾经的一丝‘陪伴’妹妹将它无限放大，转化为无尽的占有欲，要求江时永远陪伴她！
第二天去到学校，昔日的著称‘温柔’的大小姐青梅，以家里“电脑坏了。”邀请江时去家里帮忙修理，本就对青梅白七音有好感的江时并没有拒绝。
然而没想到的是，江时当天就被下药，倒在了床上。
白七音看着江时那昏睡的样子，俏脸上逐渐流露出兴奋，甚至疯狂的表情，“亲爱的...亲爱的...为什么要丢下我一个人离开呢？”
随后并疯狂贴贴他的身体。
等江时醒来后，她却又变回了昔日的温柔神情，就好似一切都未发生过般。
这天放学，半路却被妈妈债主雇佣的一群催债的保镖拦住！
身无分文的江时本以为这次必定要死之际，没想到债主竟是回到京都上大学的学姐！
学姐顾伶月翘着裹着黑丝的大腿，绯红的瞳孔带着些许暧昧的注视着他，
“小学弟，既然没钱还债的话，那就用你的身体来偿还吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b50fccd2826ede6c4a155d0c8f0afd90","author":"小熊真的在努力","author_id":"","book_id":"7366556488057244696","book_name":"京都：病娇大小姐们都想拥有我！","book_short_name":"病歌月诗音","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7220人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7367752178917720601","read_count":"7220","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"272720"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"129","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe5c4390471c899861c63e664b7271e01~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301517&x-signature=Xvh8g64Ali659NYGGr5CCdNgjt4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2199463546338856","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"247"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202251777572B4E40C4E3723A96"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":58373,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":61801,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9487},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comm ":"7598034702653899582","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的，也不算是男弱女强吧，男主自我意识还是挺多的，唯一看的难受的地方就是男主太聪明了吧（虽然正常人都这样）但是自我意识太强了很难代入了，比较喜欢看那种男主傻傻被骗进来杀的感觉[害羞]，但是人物形象没毛病好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769057900,"group_id":"7366556488057244696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"超级喜欢甜文，是一个网文二次元小白喵，希望能与大家好好相处哦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7WmxHVC6tOTtdvKYkihHwRLhV0q4E/Zl09anSeVe5GM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4b7e595cc716484aa780179bd158986d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702792&x-signature=PJCdV89m9f%2FqXRIaafIyefrJv2c%3D","user_id":"1198933913137341","user_name":"莉莉周……"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1198933913137341","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366556488057244696","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常+多女主+轻度病娇+强制爱+男弱女强（介意慎入）（无任何金手指）】
